nodes.name: Bearded scrub robin
nodes.summary: Bearded scrub robin（Bearded scrub robin，学名 Tychaedon quadrivirgata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Sand forest。

nodes.name: Sand forest
nodes.summary: Sand forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括灰腿穴䳍、Brown-banded puffbird、Rusty-backed antwren等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Its occurs in sand forests, riverine woodland, scrubs, evergreen forests, and sometimes gardens and reedbeds, but usually not in damp areas. In the 1950s, deforestation near Hluhluwe and False Bay destroyed some of its habitat,{{cite encyclopedia|author=T
